trait.name: Master of Aether
trait.effect:
You are the master of manipulating ethereal currents, granting the following benefits.
• Aether Surge round 3+, you increase all area damage you deal by +2.
• Aether Wall have automatic cover against abilities used by any character 3 or more spaces away.

basicAttack.name: Magi
basicAttack.effect:
Attack: 2 damage. Hit: +1d6
Area effect: 2 damage
Effect a difficult (5+) dangerous terrain space in the center space, even if it's occupied.

keywords.name: Stance
keywords.description: A powerful ongoing effect. You can only maintain one stance at a time. You may exit any stance voluntarily at the start of your turn.
